description: A single-stage model rocket design has suffered a torn forward body tube ('zipper') and needs structural repair. Modify the 'simple_model_rocket.ork' design into a two-piece spliced airframe by replacing the 28 cm body tube with a 'Fore' tube and an 'Aft' tube (each approximately 14 cm) joined by a 'Tube Coupler'. The Fore section must house the Parachute, Shock Cord, and Nose Cone, while the Aft section must house the Fins, Motor Mount (Inner Tube), and Launch Lug. Ensure the repaired rocket is stable with a simulated apogee exceeding 50m. Save the modified design to '~/Documents/rockets/spliced_airframe.ork' and write a repair report documenting the final mass, stability margin, and apogee to '~/Documents/exports/splice_repair_report.txt'.
